name: Wendy's 2026 Measurement Framework

metrics.name: Social-attributed visit lift
metrics.definition: Incremental restaurant visits attributable to social/earned campaigns, measured via lift studies — not impressions or engagement
metrics.supports_objective: Convert the brand's social-media fame into measurable visits and frequency
metrics.target: Positive, measurable visit lift per major social moment
metrics.data_source: Marketing mix modeling and incrementality/lift studies

metrics.name: Breakfast daypart sales and repeat rate
metrics.definition: Breakfast-daypart sales and the share of breakfast customers who return within the period
metrics.supports_objective: Grow breakfast trial and repeat among value-seeking, mobile-first customers
metrics.target: Breakfast sales and repeat up year-over-year

metrics.name: Digital sales mix and loyalty enrollment
metrics.definition: Share of transactions placed through the app plus net new Wendy's Rewards enrollments
metrics.supports_objective: Increase app-led offer redemption and loyalty enrollment
metrics.target: Digital mix and loyalty base up year-over-year

metrics.name: Quality-plus-value perception
metrics.definition: Brand-tracker scores for food quality and value vs. key burger-QSR competitors
metrics.supports_objective: Sustain quality-plus-value perception during value-menu price wars

metrics.name: Franchisee value-menu margin health
metrics.definition: Franchisee contribution margin on value-menu mix — must not degrade as value promotions scale
metrics.supports_objective: Sustain quality-plus-value perception during value-menu price wars
metrics.target: Hold or improve vs. prior year

measurement_cadence: Monthly business review; quarterly brand and strategic review
measurement_approach: Marketing mix modeling and incrementality tests for traffic; app/loyalty analytics for digital; quarterly brand tracker for perception. Directional targets pending franchise-system planning.
source: Built from public information: The Wendy's Company public filings and public reporting on the brand's marketing (2024). Metrics and targets inferred from public strategic priorities; not internal scorecard values.
